classes.name: conjure_python_client._serde.decoder.ConjureDecoder

methods.name: conjure_python_client._serde.decoder.ConjureDecoder.decode_conjure_bean_type
documentation:
Decodes json into a conjure bean type (a plain bean, not enum
or union).

Args:
    obj: the json object to decode
    conjure_type: a class object which is the bean type
        we're decoding into
    return_none_for_unknown_union_types: if set to True, returns None
        instead of raising an exception when an unknown union type is
        encountered
Returns:
    A instance of a bean of type conjure_type.

methods.name: conjure_python_client._serde.decoder.ConjureDecoder.decode_conjure_union_type
documentation:
Decodes json into a conjure union type.

Args:
    obj: the json object to decode
    conjure_type: a class object which is the union type
        we're decoding into
    return_none_for_unknown_union_types: if set to True, returns None
        instead of raising an exception when an unknown union type is
        encountered
Returns:
    An instance of type conjure_type.

methods.name: conjure_python_client._serde.decoder.ConjureDecoder.decode_conjure_enum_type
documentation:
Decodes json into a conjure enum type.

Args:
    obj: the json object to decode
    conjure_type: a class object which is the enum type
        we're decoding into.
Returns:
    An instance of enum of type conjure_type.

methods.name: conjure_python_client._serde.decoder.ConjureDecoder.decode_dict
documentation:
Decodes json into a dictionary, handling conversion of the
keys/values (the keys/values may themselves require conversion).

Args:
    obj: the json object to decode
    key_type: a class object which is the conjure type
        of the keys in this dict
    item_type: a class object which is the conjure type
        of the values in this dict
    return_none_for_unknown_union_types: if set to True, returns None
        instead of raising an exception when an unknown union type is
        encountered
Returns:
    A python dictionary, where the keys are instances of type key_type
    and the values are of type value_type.

methods.name: conjure_python_client._serde.decoder.ConjureDecoder.decode_list
documentation:
Decodes json into a list, handling conversion of the elements.

Args:
    obj: the json object to decode
    element_type: a class object which is the conjure type of
        the elements in this list.
    return_none_for_unknown_union_types: if set to True, returns None
        instead of raising an exception when an unknown union type is
        encountered
Returns:
    A python list where the elements are instances of type
        element_type.

methods.name: conjure_python_client._serde.decoder.ConjureDecoder.decode_optional
documentation:
Decodes json into an element, returning None if the provided object
is None.

Args:
    obj: the json object to decode
    object_type: a class object which is the conjure type of
        the object if present.
    return_none_for_unknown_union_types: if set to True, returns None
        instead of raising an exception when an unknown union type is
        encountered
Returns:
    The decoded obj or None if no obj is provided.

methods.name: conjure_python_client._serde.decoder.ConjureDecoder.do_decode
documentation:
Decodes json into the specified type

Args:
    obj: the json object to decode
    obj_type: a class object which is the type we're decoding into.
    return_none_for_unknown_union_types: if set to True, returns None
        instead of raising an exception when an unknown union type is
        encountered
Decodes json into a conjure object

variables.name: conjure_python_client._http.requests_client.SOCKET_KEEP_ALIVE
documentation: Enable keep alive.

variables.name: conjure_python_client._http.requests_client.SOCKET_KEEP_INTVL
documentation: Interval of 120s between individual keepalive probes.

variables.name: conjure_python_client._http.requests_client.SOCKET_KEEP_IDLE
documentation: After 120s of idle connection, start keepalive probes.

methods.name: conjure_python_client._http.requests_client.Service._uri
documentation: returns a random uri

methods.name: conjure_python_client._http.requests_client.Service._request
documentation:
Make requests using configured {class}`requests.Session`.
Any error details will be extracted to an {class}`HTTPError`
which will contain relevant error details when printed.

classes.name: conjure_python_client._http.requests_client.RetryWithJitter
documentation:
Extends the standard urllib Retry in order to match conjure behaviour.
Retry times contain a uniform jitter. Additionally, all http methods are
considered valid to retry.

classes.name: conjure_python_client._http.requests_client.TransportAdapter
documentation: Transport adapter that allows customising ssl things

classes.name: conjure_python_client._http.requests_client.ConjureHTTPError

methods.name: conjure_python_client._http.requests_client.ConjureHTTPError.cause
documentation:
The wrapped `HTTPError` that was the direct cause of
the `ConjureHTTPError`.

methods.name: conjure_python_client._http.requests_client.ConjureHTTPError.error_code
documentation: A fixed code word identifying the type of error.

methods.name: conjure_python_client._http.requests_client.ConjureHTTPError.error_name
documentation: A fixed name identifying the error.

methods.name: conjure_python_client._http.requests_client.ConjureHTTPError.error_instance_id
documentation: A unique identifier for this error instance.

methods.name: conjure_python_client._http.requests_client.ConjureHTTPError.parameters
documentation: A set of parameters that further explain the error.

methods.name: conjure_python_client._http.requests_client.ConjureHTTPError.trace_id
documentation: The X-B3-TraceId for the request.

An HTTPError from a Conjure Service with `SerializableError`
attributes extracted from the response.
